title: Upcoming Bogota Nomads Meetup
description: Hey Nomads,We're planning on our next event the first week of March. We need your input on some details before we select the date and the location.On the October 18th Meetup, we had 30 people show up and 27 on the January 30th. Since then, the group has grown by 20% more.
author: Bogota Nomads
